subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who hath turned unto the Countenance and believed in God, the One, the All-Informed. O seeker, verily the Sought One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من اقبل الی الوجه و آمن بالله الفرد الخبیر ان یا طالب ان المطلوب
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @presence of; reunion with God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @nearness and remoteness
